description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits. Upper Toe holder and wire with crystal embellishments on a transparent midfoot strap Smooth footbed with modern design for extra comfort and added style Embossed branding on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole Raised heel with textured grooves Sandal Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
